headline: The Cold War: Ideological Conflict and Nuclear Standoff
description: The Cold War defined global politics for 45 years — an ideological struggle between capitalism and communism, enforced by nuclear deterrence and fought through proxies, propaganda, and technological competition.

citation.name: The Cold War: A New History
The Cold War: A World History
The Cold War: A World History (2nd Edition, 2025)
citation.author: Westad O.A.
